title: Web Herald
heading: Disrupting Tomorrow, Monetizing Today
description: Welcome to Web Herald, where we leverage the power of buzzwords, blockchain, and performative activism to build a brighter, more profitable future. Our mission? To connect communities, empower engagement, and maximize quarterly returns—preferably all at once. We believe in a world where every click is a revolution, every like is a movement, and every rainbow logo is a tax write-off. Join us as we innovate, iterate, and occasionally pretend to care.
footer: Web Herald. Changing the world, one press release at a time.

projects.title: Web Herald (Satire)
projects.description: A tongue-in-cheek satire of tech, buzzwords, and performative activism. This site parodies the world of web disruption, blockchain, and quarterly returns.

projects.title: Interlinked
projects.description: A new project exploring the interconnectedness of digital identities, networks, and society. More details coming soon.

overconsumption: Happiness is just one more purchase away!
You too can find love today!
